stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Wapikoni Mobile is a traveling video studio founded in Quebec.
  • Wapikoni means “flower” in Atikamekw.
  • It supports Indigenous youth in creating short films and music recordings.
  • It produced a documentary about caribou hunting (atihko kweskweweh in Atikamekw).
  • It produced a song about northern lights (wawatay nokin) by a young Anishinaabe artist.
stem: The student wants to specify the documentary's name in Atikamekw. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: The Wapikoni Mobile studio supports Indigenous youth in creating short films, such as the caribou hunting documentary, and music recordings.
Wapikoni, which means “flower” in Atikamekw, produced a documentary about caribou hunting.
The name of the traveling video studio Wapikoni Mobile means “flower” in Atikamekw.
The caribou hunting documentary, which was produced by the Wapikoni Mobile studio, is called atihko kweskweweh in Atikamekw.

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The sentence specifies the documentary's name in Atikamekw, noting that it is called atihko kweskweweh.

Choice A is incorrect. While the sentence mentions the documentary, it does not specify its name in Atikamekw. Choice B is incorrect. While the sentence mentions the documentary, it does not specify its name in Atikamekw. Choice C is incorrect. The sentence does not mention the documentary or specify its name in Atikamekw.
